subject: Add instantiateVFWCLDN for DANOS
commit_message:
Add instantiateVFWCLDN for DANOS

Issue-ID: INT-1566
Change-Id: I48525947492061a98092f3b102ba240146a18e61
Signed-off-by: Brian Freeman <bf1936@att.com>

Patch Set 2:

> Patch Set 1:

> Can you check line 31 in ete-k8s.sh? It seems that the echo command doesn't have closing " but comma and extra space

sorry - fixed - it was such a simple change to add to the usage line and I messed it up :)
